source.title: From Correctness to Collaboration: A Human-Centered Taxonomy of AI Agent Behavior in Software Engineering
source.venue: Extended Abstracts of the 2026 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI EA '26)

extraction.notes: The official Google-hosted ACM manuscript identifies itself as a five-page CHI EA '26 paper, not a ten-page paper. Its title and author list differ from the later 23-page immutable arXiv v1 framework: Ja Young Lee is not an author, and the conference paper contains the 91-rule-set taxonomy but not the later interview-derived time-horizon and prototyping-derived work-type studies. The conference PDF states that an annotator prompt and codebook are in supplemental material, but neither the Google Research publication page nor the PDF exposes a supplemental-artifact URL; no rule corpus, interview material, or codebook was acquired. This record establishes source provenance and extraction only; no deep review is claimed.
